_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: Include the Secret Bosses and its associated Classes and Skills.
Defeating Galdera will be part of the goal to win the game.
Finishing Ophilia's Chapter 4 will be part of the goal to win the game.
Finishing Cyrus's Chapter 4 will be part of the goal to win the game.
Finishing Tressa's Chapter 4 will be part of the goal to win the game.
Finishing Olberic's Chapter 4 will be part of the goal to win the game.
Finishing Primrose's Chapter 4 will be part of the goal to win the game.
Finishing Alfyn's Chapter 4 will be part of the goal to win the game.
Finishing Therion's Chapter 4 will be part of the goal to win the game.
Finishing H'aanit's Chapter 4 will be part of the goal to win the game.
Side Stories will be added as extra locations if enabled.
Every Non-Missable chest will be a location if enabled.
The only missable chest is the one in Cyrus's Chapter where he falls down a hole.
Every Non-Missable Hidden Item will be a location if enabled.
If enabled, all level 50+ locations will be included when you enable side stories, chests and/or hidden items.
An average playthrough of Octopath Traveler leaves the party around level 50 but there are a few locations which require more grinding.
If enabled, only One Traveler will be chosen for your whole run.
Does not work with Galdera Goal.
If enabled, adds one of each of the various accessories into the pool of items.
Earrings and Rings will be treated as filler.
Bracelets will be treated as useful.
Necklaces will be treated as progression.
Other Accessories will be treated as either Useful or Progression depending on their stats.
If enabled, adds one of each of the various weapons into the pool of items.
Most weapons are considered as filler items
The highest tier weapon you can buy at shops and up to Battle-tested weapons are considered useful.
Battle-tested weapons will be considered as Progression.
When enabled, each Traveler's Chapter includes a check for each story beat as seen in the journal.
If enabled, each tier of a land requires progressive Map Pieces to access. Tier one need 1 Piece, Tier 2 need 2 Pieces etc...
If disabled, each tier of a land has its own seperate item.
